notes: Day 8 retrieval gold set. Queries written and committed before any retrieval ran (see git history). Three categories: identifier (should favour BM25), conceptual (should favour vector), cross_document (fusion's real case). Judgements are placeholders here and are filled by pooled judgement after build_pool — every chunk graded 0/1/2 with provenance stripped. Pre-registered prediction: hybrid's aggregate win comes almost entirely from the identifier category, and it is flat or slightly worse than vector alone on conceptual queries.
